table.style: width: 100%; font-family: Arial; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 12px;

td.style: font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid black; padding: 3px; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 8px; text-align: center;

img.style: max-width: 150px; max-height: 100px; display: block; margin: 0 auto;

span.style: display: block; margin-top: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;

td.t: 抽样计划 AQL=0.25%, C=0，根据质量控制检验说明执行
Sampling Plan AQL=0.25%, C=0 in accordance with Quality Control Inspection Instructions

td.t: COUNTRY OF ORIGIN : MADE IN SINGAPORE

td.style: border: 1px solid black; font-weight: bold; padding: 7px; text-align:center; text-decoration: underline;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 7px; text-align:center;
td.t:
兹证明所有提供的零件均符合规格、图纸和要求。
所有提供的产品均符合ROHS标准。

This is to certify that all the parts supplied conform to the specifications, drawings and requirements.
All products supplied are ROHS compliant.
